# [network-request] AvantLink

**Network name:** AvantLink

**Slug:** `avantlink`

**Publisher dashboard URL:** https://www.avantlink.com/affiliates.php

**API documentation URL:** https://classic.avantlink.com/api.php

**Account requirements:** Active AvantLink affiliate account, "Affiliate API
Key" issued from the account tools page after a brief application step.

**Why this is useful for publishers:** Long-standing publisher network with
strong outdoor / specialty retail coverage. REST API is straightforward and
well-documented. Tier-2 in demand but a frequent request from niche-vertical
publishers.
